name: codixing
description: Ultra-fast code retrieval for AI agents — structural search, dependency graph, MCP integration

codixing.binaryPath.description: Path to the codixing binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH or common locations.

codixing.mcpBinaryPath.description: Path to the codixing-mcp binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

codixing.autoStartDaemon.description: Automatically start the codixing-mcp daemon when the extension activates.

codixing.embeddings.description: Enable vector embeddings when initializing a new index (slower init, better search quality).

codixing.lspBinaryPath.description: Path to the codixing-lsp binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

codixing.lspEnabled.description: Start the Codixing LSP server for hover, go-to-definition, references, and complexity diagnostics.

codixing.complexityThreshold.description: Minimum cyclomatic complexity to show as a diagnostic (6 = moderate+, 11 = high+, 26 = critical only).
